attributes.ebpf.db.query: INSERT INTO users (username, email, phone) VALUES ($1, $2, $3) RETURNING id
SELECT id, username, email, phone FROM users WHERE username = $1
SELECT id, username, email, phone FROM users WHERE id = $1
